prompt: I need validation for the vault item form. Fields: item_name required, category (one of: insurance, financial, digital, physical, contact, wishes), notes optional string, url optional string. User doesn't need to sign anything.

assertions.text: category uses z.enum with all 6 correct values
assertions.check: enum contains insurance, financial, digital, physical, contact, wishes

assertions.text: url uses plain .string().optional() — no extra validators (no .url(), no .or())
assertions.check: url field is simple optional, no chained validators
